page.title: Settings
page.subtitle: Defaults applied every time the dashboard loads and to the import tools.

errors.saveFailed: Could not save the settings. Please try again.

gapThreshold.label: Dashed-line threshold (days)
gapThreshold.help: A gap of more than X days between two points is drawn as a dashed line.

duplicateThreshold.label: Default similarity threshold (possible duplicates)
duplicateThreshold.help: Filters out duplicate groups whose label similarity is below the threshold.

mcp.description: Lets a local assistant (Ollama via an MCP client) manage your transactions. Content is encrypted with the token — nothing travels in the clear.
mcp.tokenWarning: This token will not be shown again — copy it now.
mcp.tokenConfigHint: Configure the MCP client with <1>ATHENA_MCP_USER</1> (your username) and<3> ATHENA_MCP_TOKEN</3>.

reset.dialogDescription: All your settings will return to their default values. This action cannot be undone.

help.description: Shows the guided tour and every hidden section tip again.

onboarding.title: First use
onboarding.subtitle: Create your username and password to get started.

form.subtitleRegister: Choose a username and a password. Your data will be kept fully separate from other users.
form.subtitleLogin: Sign in to access your accounts.
form.passwordTooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
form.localFirstText: Your data never leaves your network.

page.title: Profile
page.subtitle: Change your username or password. Your current password is asked every time to confirm it's really you.

form.newPasswordPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current password

errors.currentPasswordRequired: The current password is required to confirm.
errors.newPasswordTooShort: The new password must be at least 8 characters long.
errors.newPasswordMismatch: The new passwords do not match.
